content:
Snap Color Picker: A Free Chrome Extension to Pick Colors from Any Website
Every frontend developer and designer has needed to identify a color from a webpage.
Usually, that means opening DevTools, inspecting elements, or even taking a screenshot just to find a HEX code.
I wanted something faster.
That’s why I built Snap Color Picker a lightweight Chrome extension that lets you pick any color from a webpage or your screen with a single click.
Why I Built Snap Color Picker
I tested many popular Chrome color picker extensions before starting this project.
Some were missing modern color formats.
Others required too many clicks.
Some didn’t offer page-wide color extraction or a useful color history.
Instead of switching between multiple tools, I wanted one extension that handled everything in a clean and simple interface.
Features
🎨 Pick colors from any webpage
🖥️ Pick colors from anywhere on your screen
🔍 17×17 pixel zoom for accurate selection
🎯 Copy colors instantly in:
- HEX
- RGB
- HSL
- HSV
- CMYK
- OKLCH
📋 One-click copy
📚 Save your last 50 colors
📌 Pin favorite colors
🌐 Scan any webpage to extract its complete color palette
Including:
- Top Colors
- Brand Colors
- Background Colors
- Text Colors
- Border Colors
- Link Colors
🌙 Dark & Light mode
🔒 No tracking, no analytics, no accounts
Everything stays on your device.
Built for
- Frontend Developers
- UI Designers
- UX Designers
- Tailwind CSS Developers
- QA Engineers
- Digital Artists
- Content Creators
What I Learned
This became my first published Chrome extension.
During development I learned a lot about:
- Chrome Extension APIs
- EyeDropper API
- Browser permissions
- Performance optimization
- Building responsive extension UIs
- Creating developer-focused tools
It was an enjoyable challenge and a great learning experience.
What’s Next
I’m actively improving Snap Color Picker and shipping new updates regularly.
If you have ideas or feature requests, I’d love to hear them.
Try Snap Color Picker
You can install it from the Chrome Web Store:
👉 https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/snap-color-picker/mjeedkpeoafpaalcgmfepblpohmnkddh
If you find it useful, I’d really appreciate a review. It helps independent developers continue building better tools.
Thanks for reading! 🚀
